proposals.motive: Add a defensive wrapper that enforces isDangerousCommand checks before any execSync call, preventing accidental injection from unsanitized callers.
Provide a JSON-schema validator stub for missions/ files so imperative code in mission configs is rejected before execution.
proposals.apply_error: error: No valid patches in input (allow with "--allow-empty")

proposals.motive: Document and enforce that WORKSPACE_ROOT must be explicit; emit a loud warning when falling back to cwd to remove silent traversal risk.
Replace developer-specific hardcoded paths with environment-variable lookups so the script is portable and does not leak local system structure.
Provide a spawn-based kill-switch helper with a 5s timeout and explicit cleanup so PowerShell subprocesses cannot become zombies.
proposals.apply_error: error: No valid patches in input (allow with "--allow-empty")

proposals.motive: Establish baseline CI with build, lint, npm audit, and a test stub so future regressions and known-vuln deps are caught automatically on every PR.
proposals.diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@
+name: ci
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+
+jobs:
+  build-and-audit:
+    runs-on: windows-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+          cache: 'npm'
+      - name: Install
+        run: npm ci
+      - name: Lint (best-effort)
+        run: npm run lint --if-present
+      - name: Build
+        run: npm run build --if-present
+      - name: Test
+        run: npm test --if-present
+      - name: npm audit (high+)
+        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
+        continue-on-error: true
+      - name: Grep for hardcoded user paths
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          $hits = Select-String -Path 'src/**/*.ts','scripts/**/*.ts' -Pattern 'C:\\Users\\' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+          if ($hits) { $hits; throw 'Hardcoded user paths detected' }
proposals.apply_error: error: No valid patches in input (allow with "--allow-empty")

proposals.motive: Add an ESLint config fragment enabling security-focused rules (no-eval, detect-child-process) for SAST coverage referenced by the CI pipeline.
proposals.apply_error: error: No valid patches in input (allow with "--allow-empty")
